description: (re)generate agents/openai.yaml UI metadata for an existing skill dir
rules: local-only: writes <SKILL_DIR>/agents/openai.yaml, no remote or live service
display_name + short_description derived deterministically from the SKILL.md frontmatter name unless overridden
short_description must be 25-64 chars or the core errors (porter still records the log)
usage: Set SKILL_DIR (existing skill folder with a SKILL.md). Optional NAME override, optional INTERFACE (one key=value). Output: openai_yaml.out (and <SKILL_DIR>/agents/openai.yaml).
limitation: Requires a SKILL.md with valid frontmatter in SKILL_DIR; requires python3 + PyYAML.
